footer.tagline: Unforgettable tours across Kyrgyzstan and Central Asia. Exploring the beauty of the region since 2018.

home.heroSub: Day trips and multi-day tours with experienced guides. Mountain treks, cultural routes and unforgettable adventures.
home.ctaWhatsapp: Didn't find the right tour? Write to us

whyUs.label: Kapriz Travel
whyUs.heading: Why Choose Us
whyUs.reliability_text: 6 years in business, over 2,500 satisfied tourists. Licensed tour operator in Kyrgyzstan.
whyUs.guides_text: Professional guides with deep knowledge of the regions and history of Central Asia.
whyUs.price_text: No hidden fees. Everything included — transfer, guide, meals as per the program.
whyUs.support_text: Available on WhatsApp and Telegram. We answer questions before, during and after the tour.

about.metaDesc: Kapriz Travel — a tourism company in Kyrgyzstan. Organising tours across Central Asia since 2018.
about.label: Kapriz Travel
about.heading: About Us
about.subheading: Since 2018 we've been showing tourists the beauty of Kyrgyzstan and Central Asia. More than 2,500 tourists have joined our tours.
about.p1: Kapriz Travel was founded in 2018 with a simple idea: show tourists the real Kyrgyzstan — not from a bus window, but through direct contact with nature, culture and people.
about.p2: We specialise in day trips and multi-day tours across Kyrgyzstan, and also organise trips to Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan. Our catalogue ranges from mountain treks to cultural expeditions along the Silk Road.
about.p3: Every tour is designed to leave unforgettable memories. Experienced guides, comfortable transport and transparent pricing are our core principles.
about.ctaSub: Choose a tour or send a request — we'll find the right route for you

contact.metaDesc: Contact us via WhatsApp, Telegram or Instagram. Bishkek, Kyrgyzstan.
contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.heading: Contact
contact.sub: We answer all questions during business hours. Usually respond within an hour.
